one_minute_value_explanation: AOF v9.4 users can install a CI-corrected patch tag whose package metadata, active release manifest, README, Quickstart, and release notes all agree on the current release.
thirty_second_version_delta: v9.4.1 does not add provider authority; it corrects v9.4 release metadata and install path consistency after the v9.4.0 tag CI failed.
product_review_trigger: If users cannot tell which v9.4 tag is safe to install, reopen as a release comprehension and installation reliability issue.
not_proven: This patch delta does not prove production provider execution, semantic correctness, credential safety, billing safety, actual rollback execution, or market adoption.
